scenarios.title: TARGET_ENV=self-hosted emits SMACKEREL_ENV=production into the generated env file
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh (pre-fix per-target block had only a TARGET_ENV=test arm; no self-hosted arm)

scenarios.title: (canary) TARGET_ENV=dev still emits SMACKEREL_ENV=development
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh (the dev target inherits runtime.environment=development from smackerel.yaml; the BUG-051-001 fix MUST NOT over-reach to dev)

scenarios.title: (canary) TARGET_ENV=test still emits SMACKEREL_ENV=test (MIT-040-S-004 preserved)
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh (the pre-existing test arm of the per-target case must remain; MIT-040-S-004 ergonomic for integration/e2e/stress runs)

scenarios.title: (defense-in-depth) TARGET_ENV=self-hosted against unpatched live yaml is still rejected by FR-051-005 generator-side guard with spec 051 attribution and without echoing the literal value
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh lines ~415-433 (the FR-051-005 generator-side guard MUST continue to fire for the dev-default Postgres password on the self-hosted target — it is orthogonal to the BUG-051-001 SMACKEREL_ENV mapping)
